title: Light Fast Grass
description: Boost FPS and play smoothly with simplified, high-performance grass textures.
body:
# Light Fast Grass Pack by Ownix

🌿 **Light Fast Grass Pack** is a vibrant Minecraft **texture pack** that enhances grass textures for a brighter, cleaner, and more dynamic look.

☀️ Enjoy smoother and lighter grass that makes outdoor landscapes pop.  
⚡ Optimized for performance, so your game stays fast and responsive.  
🎮 Perfect for builders, explorers, and players who want lively and eye-catching environments.

## Features
- 🌱 Brighter, faster-rendering grass textures  
- 👀 Enhanced visual clarity without sacrificing performance  
- 🌳 Immersive design that improves outdoor landscapes

---

**🎨 Design & Branding:**  
Designed by **Ownix Studio**
